title: The Giants Honor the Straw Hats
description: On pages 13–16, the giants honor the straw hats as the battle on Little Garden closes with the giants’ pride restored and the Straw Hats preparing to leave the ancient island.
scene: The Giants Honor the Straw Hats. The battle on Little Garden closes with the giants’ pride restored and the Straw Hats preparing to leave the ancient island. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It's already been quite some time since I sent you my orders.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Alright, I think I understand the current situation now...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This is the enemy's secret hideout; and a guy-called Mr.3 is on this island to hunt down viv1. "

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Damn it... I really shouldn't have been caught up in some hunting game...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I hope the guys are all safe.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What are you being so silent for?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Have you eliminated Princess VIVI and the Strawhat Pirates or not?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I've carried out my mission alright.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: All the people who know of your secret are now no more,

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: So there is no more need for further pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Unlockies are headed your way right now.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Once they confirm your mission's success,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They'll hand you a certain package.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Once you receive it, head to Alabasta with Ms. Golden-week immediately.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The time has come... We must now carry out the most crucial step of our plan.

summary: This part centers on the giants honor the straw hats, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
